title: IA smaller shield and totem
description: The Iconic Ahmed Texture Pack makes combat sleeker by giving the shield and totem a smaller, less intrusive design while keeping their original style intact. It’s perfect for players who want a cleaner screen and smoother gameplay.
body: The Iconic Ahmed Smaller Shield and Totem Pack is a simple quality-of-life texture pack designed to improve visibility during gameplay. It reduces the size of both the shield and the totem of undying, making them less intrusive on the screen while still keeping their original look and function. This pack is perfect for players who want a cleaner interface without changing the core Minecraft style or balance. It does not add new mechanics or alter gameplay, only adjusts the visuals for better comfort and immersion.
